name: Share India Securities Limited
summary: Share India Securities Limited, a financial services company, trades in securities. The company offers broking/depository services, including equity, derivative, commodity, currency, mutual funds, and depository services; loan against securities, loan against commodities, business loans, and personal loans, as well as short, medium, and long term financial loans; and life and general insurances for individual and corporates. It also provides qualified institutional placements; bulk and block trades on exchanges; off-market transactions; arranges private equity; valuation advisory; open offers, buyback, and delisting of securities; and equity mobilization services for infrastructure projects from private equity investors, as well as manages initial public offerings and rights offering. In addition, the company offers a range of financial products and personalized services, including currency and commodity derivative, depository participant, research and analysis, mutual fund advisory and distributorship, and portfolio management services. It serves customers through a network of approximately 587 branches across 14 states in India. The company was formerly known as FMS Securities Limited and changed its name to Share India Securities Limited in 2010. Share India Securities Limited was founded in 1994 and is based in Delhi, India.
